HGSS.455.0000:
Brock: Wow, it’s not often that we
get a challenger from Johto.\f
I’m Brock, the Pewter Gym Leader.\r
I’m an expert on Rock-type Pokémon.\f
My Pokémon are impervious to most
physical attacks.\f
You’ll have a hard time inflicting
any damage.\f
Come on!\f
HGSS.455.0001:
Brock: Your Pokémon’s powerful
attacks overcame my\r
rock-hard resistance...\f
You’re stronger than
I expected...\r
Go ahead--take this Badge.\f
HGSS.455.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Boulder Badge from Brock!
HGSS.455.0003:
Brock: I really enjoyed the battle
with you, [0103,0000,0000]!\r
I’ll give you the move Rock Slide, too.\f
It can sometimes cause your foe
to flinch.\f
HGSS.455.0004:
Brock: I really enjoyed the battle
with you, [0103,0000,0000]!\r
I’ll give you the move Rock Slide, too.\f
It can sometimes cause your foe
to flinch.\f
HGSS.455.0005:
Brock: The world is huge. There are
still many strong Trainers like you.\f
Just wait and see.\f
I’m going to become a lot
stronger, too.
HGSS.455.0006:
Yo! Legend in the making! You look...\r
really rocking.\f
Are you battling the Gym Leaders
of Kanto?\f
They’re strong and dedicated people,
just like Johto’s Gym Leaders.
HGSS.455.0007:
Yo! Legend in the making! That Gym
didn’t give you much trouble.\f
The way you took charge was
really inspiring.\r
I mean that seriously.
HGSS.455.0009:
Pewter City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Brock
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
